package.name: armv7_dyn_ident
package.description: Dynamics parameter identification for the armv7 arm. Provides a static-pose data collector (drives the arm in the existing position mode and records joint angle + measured torque), a symbolic gravity regressor built from the URDF, and an offline least-squares identification script that fits per-link mass + centre-of-mass. The result feeds armv7_zero_force_controller for gravity compensation / free-drive. A Fourier excitation trajectory generator is included for future full-dynamics identification (v0.2).
package.author: TianFeiF
